heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1287 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter, other than sections 1286(e), 1288 and 1289 of this title, for the fiscal year ending , not to exceed $5,000,000,000, for the fiscal year ending , not to exceed $6,000,000,000, and for the fiscal year ending , not to exceed $7,000,000,000, and subject to such amounts as are provided in appropriation Acts, for the fiscal year ending , $1,000,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $4,500,000,000 and for the fiscal years ending , , not to exceed $5,000,000,000; for the fiscal year ending , not to exceed $2,548,837,000; and for the fiscal years ending , , , and , not to exceed $2,400,000,000 per fiscal year; and for each of the fiscal years ending , , and , not to exceed $2,400,000,000; and for each of the fiscal years ending , and , not to exceed $1,200,000,000.June 30, 1973June 30, 1974June 30, 1975September 30, 1977September 30, 1978September 30, 1979September 30, 1980September 30, 1981September 30, 1982September 30, 1983September 30, 1984September 30, 1985September 30, 1986September 30, 1987September 30, 1988September 30, 1989September 30, 1990
notes: Amendments1987— inserted “; and for each of the fiscal years ending , , and , not to exceed $2,400,000,000; and for each of the fiscal years ending , and , not to exceed $1,200,000,000” before period at end.Pub. L. 100–4September 30, 1986September 30, 1987September 30, 1988September 30, 1989September 30, 19901981— substituted “and for the fiscal years ending , , , and , not to exceed $2,400,000,000 per fiscal year” for “and for the fiscal year ending , not to exceed $0, unless there is enacted legislation establishing an allotment formula for fiscal year 1982 construction grant funds and otherwise reforming the municipal sewage treatment construction grant program under this subchapter, in which case the authorization for fiscal year 1982 shall be an amount not to exceed $2,400,000,000”.Pub. L. 97–117September 30, 1982September 30, 1983September 30, 1984September 30, 1985September 30, 1982substituted provisions authorizing not to exceed $2,548,837,000 for fiscal year ending , and not to exceed $0 for the fiscal year ending , unless an allotment formula is enacted, in which case the authorization is not to exceed $2,400,000,000, for provisions authorizing not to exceed $5,000,000,000 for fiscal years ending and 1982.Pub. L. 97–35Sept. 30, 1981Sept. 30, 1982Sept. 30, 19811977— inserted “and subject to such amounts as are provided in appropriation Acts, for the fiscal year ending , $1,000,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $4,500,000,000 and for the fiscal years ending , , , and , not to exceed $5,000,000,000 per fiscal year”.Pub. L. 95–217September 30, 1977September 30, 1978September 30, 1979September 30, 1980September 30, 1981September 30, 19821973— inserted reference to .Pub. L. 93–207section 1286(e) of this title

Additional Authorization of Appropriations, , , provided for authorization to carry out this subchapter, other than sections 1286, 1288, and 1289, for the fiscal year ending , not to exceed $700,000,000, which sum (subject to amounts provided in appropriation Acts) was to be allotted to each State listed in column 1 of table IV contained in House Public Works and Transportation Committee Print numbered 94–25 in accordance with the percentages provided for such State (if any) in column 5 of such table, and such sum to be in addition to, and not in lieu of, any funds otherwise authorized and to be available until expended.Pub. L. 94–369, title III, § 30190 Stat. 1011July 22, 1976Sept. 30, 1977
